calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for trial/no appearance by defendant.
Department 514; Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Casey M. Jensen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance on behalf of or by Defendant Kathryn E. Woodworth.
Counsel proceeds on answers to requests for admissions.
Counsel to e-file trial brief.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. and against Defendant Kathryn E. Woodworth as follows:
Principal $6,315.44
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $368.50
Other $200.00 (Sanctions)
Total Judgment in the amount of $6,883.94
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted - Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted - Discovery IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Chuck Geerhart; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-19-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
